input: Learning Loops and Meta-Learning Systems: Atomic steps include Observe, Orient, Compress, Visualize, Cross-analyze, Pattern extraction, Rule codification, Decide, Apply, Measure, Verify, Feedback verification, Update memory. Operational loops: OODA (Observe-Orient-Decide-Act for fast adaptation under uncertainty), PDCA (Plan-Do-Check-Act for deliberate process control). Learning layers: Single-loop (correct action errors), Double-loop (correct rule errors by updating assumptions), Triple-loop (question how the system learns). Reinforcement learning: State-Action-Reward-Policy update. Custom loop: Observe-Compress-Visualize-Cross-analyze-Apply-Verify (best for synthesis-heavy environments). Key gaps in custom loop: missing Orient, Decide, Hypothesis, Measurement, Policy update steps. Adjacent frameworks: Scientific Method, DMAIC, Kolb Experiential Learning.
curatorOutput:
Processed and upserted: existing close-match entry was merged with the new enriched reference (expanded atomic steps, loop/layer taxonomy, RL framing, and custom-loop gap analysis).
